channel.title: tundra-node
channel.description: Privacy tools, homelab projects, and open-source software

item.title: FBLA SLC 2026
item.description: I'm competing in FBLA Cybersecurity at SLC this April, so I built a study app for it.

item.title: Hosting an I2P Eepsite
item.description: Step-by-step guide to hosting your own website on the I2P network using I2Pd and Caddy.

item.title: Sites & Apps I Can't Live Without
item.description: Happy New Year! Here's what I actually use every day. Most of this stuff is free and privacy-focused.

item.title: New Blog
item.description: Started a blog. Trying to keep every page under 14KB because bloat sucks. I'll write about I2P, my projects, Nix, or whatever else I'm interested in.
